text:
Capricious Remote 移り気リモコン - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This remote allows the user to change 10 emotions of another person.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Capricious Remote 移り気リモコン - This card allows the caster to manipulate 10 emotions that somebody has towards another person. You can change each emotion with the intensity scale of 1 to 10, with 10 being the most intense. This card can't be used on yourself or one someone else's feelings towards you. There is nothing in the rules however, that prevents a friend from using it on another person to alter their feelings toward you.

他人が他人へいだく10種の感情を10段階の強弱で操作できる。（他人が自分へ抱いている感情は操作できない） 
|-
![Eng]
|No.028 - Capricious Remote 
You can operate an intensity of 10 specific feelings of others towards other. (cannot be used to change feelings towards you)
|}
